reason: Registered Nurses are responsible for life-or-death decisions in fast-paced environments where even minor errors in medication or clinical judgment can lead to fatal consequences or criminal prosecution. The role demands intense emotional labor, involving constant exposure to trauma and death, while maintaining significant legal liability for autonomous practice. Chronic understaffing and high patient-to-nurse ratios exacerbate these stressors, creating an environment of acute, sustained cognitive and emotional demand.
